subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-12 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: We must execute the divine ordinances.... The climate of Mount Carmel is peerless.... They are promulgating matters which are not in accord.... This cycle is the cycle of favor and not of justice
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @chastisement and requital, @words vs deeds, @unity; oneness of humanity, @study; deepening
